changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating api_key table for API key management.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating api_key_audit table for tracking revoked API keys.
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_key_audit ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, key_suffix VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL, key_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, scope VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, owner_user_id INTEGER NULL, organization_id INTEGER NULL, created_by INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, revoked_by INTEGER NULL, revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), total_requests BIGINT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (revoked_by) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE SET NULL );
CREATE INDEX idx_api_key_audit_org ON api_key_audit(organization_id); CREATE INDEX idx_api_key_audit_user ON api_key_audit(owner_user_id); CREATE INDEX idx_api_key_audit_revoked_at ON api_key_audit(revoked_at);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for api_key table, columns, and indexes.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for api_key_audit table, columns, and indexes.
